# Fishery Impacts from Offshore Wind Development {#wind_revenue}

```{r echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F)
library(ecodata)
library(downloadthis)
```

*Last updated February 12, 2026*

**Description**: The data presented here are annual fishery landings and ex-vessel revenues of species managed by the New England and Mid-Atlantic Fishery Management Councils by vessels issued a NMFS Greater Atlantic Regional Fisheries Office permit when fishing in offshore wind projects that are operational or currently under construction (Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind, Sunrise Wind, Revolution Wind, Vineyard Wind 1, South Fork Wind, and Empire Wind).

**Contributor(s)**: Douglas Christel, Benjamin Galuardi

**Affiliations**: GARFO

**Indicator Family**: 

- [X] Social
- [X] Economic


**Indicator Category**:

- [X] Syntheses of published information
- [X] Database pull with analysis


**Synthesis Theme**:

- [X] Multiple System Drivers


```{r download_wind_revenue}
# Download dataset from ecodata
try(downloadthis::download_this(
ecodata::wind_revenue,
output_name = 'wind_revenue',
output_extension = '.csv',
button_label = 'Download dataset from `ecodata`',
button_type = 'default',
has_icon = TRUE,
icon = 'fa fa-save',
class = 'hvr-sweep-to-left',
csv2 = F),
silent = TRUE)
```

## Introduction to Indicator
Historic fishery landings and revenue from trips that occurred within operational offshore wind projects and those under construction may be displaced and future fishing effort, landings, and revenue may change (increase or decrease) due to the presence of structures, construction and maintenance operations, and changes to species composition and distribution affected by project infrastructure and operations.  These data highlight the scale and potential fisheries, gear types, and ports that may be affected by changes to historic fishing patterns as a result of offshore wind projects.

## Key Results and Visualizations
Figures illustrate annual fishery landings and revenue trends from trips operating within operational wind projects and those currently under construction along with the proportion of annual regional fishery landings and revenue that has historically been harvested from within these projects.

**landing, Mid-Atlantic, facets**
```{r plot_wind_revenuelandingMidAtlanticfacets}
# Plot indicator
ggplotObject <- ecodata::plot_wind_revenue(varName = 'landing', report = 'MidAtlantic', plottype = 'facets', n = 10)
ggplotObject
try(downloadthis::download_this(
ggplotObject$data,
output_name = 'wind_revenuelandingMidAtlanticfacets',
output_extension = '.csv',
button_label = 'Download the data plotted above',
button_type = 'default',
has_icon = TRUE,
icon = 'fa fa-save',
class = 'hvr-sweep-to-left',
csv2 = F),
silent = TRUE)
```
<br>

**value, Mid-Atlantic, facets**
```{r plot_wind_revenuevalueMidAtlanticfacets}
# Plot indicator
ggplotObject <- ecodata::plot_wind_revenue(varName = 'value', report = 'MidAtlantic', plottype = 'facets', n = 10)
ggplotObject
try(downloadthis::download_this(
ggplotObject$data,
output_name = 'wind_revenuevalueMidAtlanticfacets',
output_extension = '.csv',
button_label = 'Download the data plotted above',
button_type = 'default',
has_icon = TRUE,
icon = 'fa fa-save',
class = 'hvr-sweep-to-left',
csv2 = F),
silent = TRUE)
```
<br>

**landing, New England, facets**
```{r plot_wind_revenuelandingNewEnglandfacets}
# Plot indicator
ggplotObject <- ecodata::plot_wind_revenue(varName = 'landing', report = 'NewEngland', plottype = 'facets', n = 10)
ggplotObject
try(downloadthis::download_this(
ggplotObject$data,
output_name = 'wind_revenuelandingNewEnglandfacets',
output_extension = '.csv',
button_label = 'Download the data plotted above',
button_type = 'default',
has_icon = TRUE,
icon = 'fa fa-save',
class = 'hvr-sweep-to-left',
csv2 = F),
silent = TRUE)
```
<br>

**value, New England, facets**
```{r plot_wind_revenuevalueNewEnglandfacets}
# Plot indicator
ggplotObject <- ecodata::plot_wind_revenue(varName = 'value', report = 'NewEngland', plottype = 'facets', n = 10)
ggplotObject
try(downloadthis::download_this(
ggplotObject$data,
output_name = 'wind_revenuevalueNewEnglandfacets',
output_extension = '.csv',
button_label = 'Download the data plotted above',
button_type = 'default',
has_icon = TRUE,
icon = 'fa fa-save',
class = 'hvr-sweep-to-left',
csv2 = F),
silent = TRUE)
```
<br>

**landing, Mid-Atlantic, nofacets**
```{r plot_wind_revenuelandingMidAtlanticnofacets}
# Plot indicator
ggplotObject <- ecodata::plot_wind_revenue(varName = 'landing', report = 'MidAtlantic', plottype = 'nofacets', n = 10)
ggplotObject
try(downloadthis::download_this(
ggplotObject$data,
output_name = 'wind_revenuelandingMidAtlanticnofacets',
output_extension = '.csv',
button_label = 'Download the data plotted above',
button_type = 'default',
has_icon = TRUE,
icon = 'fa fa-save',
class = 'hvr-sweep-to-left',
csv2 = F),
silent = TRUE)
```
<br>

**value, Mid-Atlantic, nofacets**
```{r plot_wind_revenuevalueMidAtlanticnofacets}
# Plot indicator
ggplotObject <- ecodata::plot_wind_revenue(varName = 'value', report = 'MidAtlantic', plottype = 'nofacets', n = 10)
ggplotObject
try(downloadthis::download_this(
ggplotObject$data,
output_name = 'wind_revenuevalueMidAtlanticnofacets',
output_extension = '.csv',
button_label = 'Download the data plotted above',
button_type = 'default',
has_icon = TRUE,
icon = 'fa fa-save',
class = 'hvr-sweep-to-left',
csv2 = F),
silent = TRUE)
```
<br>

**landing, New England, nofacets**
```{r plot_wind_revenuelandingNewEnglandnofacets}
# Plot indicator
ggplotObject <- ecodata::plot_wind_revenue(varName = 'landing', report = 'NewEngland', plottype = 'nofacets', n = 10)
ggplotObject
try(downloadthis::download_this(
ggplotObject$data,
output_name = 'wind_revenuelandingNewEnglandnofacets',
output_extension = '.csv',
button_label = 'Download the data plotted above',
button_type = 'default',
has_icon = TRUE,
icon = 'fa fa-save',
class = 'hvr-sweep-to-left',
csv2 = F),
silent = TRUE)
```
<br>

**value, New England, nofacets**
```{r plot_wind_revenuevalueNewEnglandnofacets}
# Plot indicator
ggplotObject <- ecodata::plot_wind_revenue(varName = 'value', report = 'NewEngland', plottype = 'nofacets', n = 10)
ggplotObject
try(downloadthis::download_this(
ggplotObject$data,
output_name = 'wind_revenuevalueNewEnglandnofacets',
output_extension = '.csv',
button_label = 'Download the data plotted above',
button_type = 'default',
has_icon = TRUE,
icon = 'fa fa-save',
class = 'hvr-sweep-to-left',
csv2 = F),
silent = TRUE)
```
<br>

## Implications
The figures generally depict periodic fluctuations in fishery landings and revenue from withing active offshore wind projects with both parameters generally decreasing over time for most species. Fishery landings and revenue within active offshore wind projects represent a very low proportion of regional fishery landings and revenue for managed species, suggesting that fishery impacts may not be substantial and that effort displacement outside of active offshore wind project areas may not substantially affect fishing operations or resources in other areas.

## Indicator statistics 
Spatial scale: Offshore wind lease areas throughout the Exclusive Economic Zone from Maine through North Carolina

Temporal scale: Annual from 2008-2024

**Variable definitions**

```{r vars_wind_revenue}
# Pull all var names
vars <- ecodata::wind_revenue |>
   dplyr::select(Var) |>
   dplyr::distinct()

DT::datatable(vars)
```
## Get the data

**Point of contact**: [Douglas Christel (douglas.christel@noaa.gov)](mailto:Douglas Christel (douglas.christel@noaa.gov)){.email}

**ecodata dataset**: `ecodata::wind_revenue`

**Tech Doc link**: <https://noaa-edab.github.io/tech-doc/wind_revenue.html>

### Public Availability

Source data are NOT publicly available.

### Accessibility Constraints

Please email douglas.christel@noaa.gov for further information or request supporting data from nmfs.gar.data.requests@noaa.gov.
